description: Interface contract between Aegis and Cortex. Defines the two narrow integration points (cortex_preflight and cortex_status) plus health check, error codes, and failure modes.

cortex_preflight_response.title: PreflightResult
cortex_preflight_response.description: Response from cortex_preflight(stage, project). Advisory context injection before stage workflow begins.

status.description: ok = full results returned, degraded = partial results at timeout boundary, unavailable = Cortex could not be reached

context_items.description: Memory items retrieved from Cortex knowledge graph, capped at max_context_items policy setting

relevance.description: Composite relevance score from hybrid FTS+vector search

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Default filter_lifecycle policy excludes non-active items.

injected_count.description: Number of context items actually injected (after filtering and cap)

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the Cortex call in milliseconds

cortex_status_response.title: StatusResult
cortex_status_response.description: Response from cortex_status(stage, project, query). Advisory historical pattern retrieval during verify/test-gate stages.

status.description: ok = query completed, degraded = partial results, unavailable = Cortex unreachable

matches.description: Matching entities from Cortex knowledge graph, truncated to top 5 by score

score.description: Composite relevance score (FTS + vector + graph expansion)

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last entity update

query_latency_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the Cortex query in milliseconds

cortex_health.title: CortexHealthCheck
cortex_health.description: Response from Cortex /health endpoint, used by detect_integrations() to probe availability.

CORTEX_UNREACHABLE.description: Cortex HTTP endpoint did not respond within timeout

CORTEX_INVALID_RESPONSE.description: Cortex response did not match expected schema

failure_modes.unreachable: Return status=unavailable, empty results. Log warning. Pipeline continues.
failure_modes.slow: Return status=degraded with partial results at timeout boundary.
failure_modes.invalid_response: Log schema violation. Return status=unavailable. Pipeline continues.
failure_modes.disabled: Skip all Cortex calls. No log entry needed.
